data.title: Kontoor Brands (NYSE: KTB) declares $0.52/share cash dividend, payable on Sept. 19, 2025, to shareholders of record by Sept. 9.
data.description: Greensboro, North Carolina - Kontoor Brands, Inc. (NYSE: KTB) has revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of September 9, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 19, 2025. Kontoor Brands, Inc. (NYSE: KTB) comprises three renowned lifestyle, outdoor, and workwear brands: Wrangler®, Lee®, and Helly Ha.

data.title: The Gorman-Rupp Company declares 302nd consecutive quarterly dividend of $0.185 per share, payable on September 10, 2025.
data.description: In Mansfield, Ohio, The Gorman-Rupp Company (NYSE: GRC) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.185 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of August 15, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 10, 2025. This upcoming dividend payment will be the company's 302nd consecutive quarterly payout. Established in 1933, The Gorman-Rupp Company is a prominent manufacturer, designer, and global marketer of pumps and related products.

data.title: Hyperscale Data's AGREE subsidiary's holding Fouquet's New York secures $145M financing with Goldman Sachs.
data.description: A diversified holding company, Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS), based in Las Vegas, made an announcement on July 25, 2025, stating that its subsidiary Ault Global Real Estate Equities, Inc. ("AGREE") has acquired a minority stake. This news comes as a strategic move, showcasing the company's growth plans.

data.description: On July 25, 2025, W&T Offshore, Inc. (NYSE: WTI) revealed the schedule for its second quarter 2025 earnings release and conference call.

data.title: AirSculpt Technologies to report Q2 2025 financial results on August 1st before market open, followed by conference call at 8:30 ET.
data.description: AirSculpt Technologies, a reputable body contouring services company, revealed that it will disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on August 1, 2025. The report will be published before the market opens, with a subsequent conference call set for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. This news, announced on July 25, 2025, marks an awaited development for stakeholders and industry watchers interested in AirSculpt's performance. AirSculpt, trading on the NASDAQ under the symbol AIRS, is recognized for its exceptional services in the body contouring sector.

data.title: European regulatory authority recommends Novo Nordisk's Alhemo® (concizumab) expansion to treat haemophilia A and B; CHMP's positive opinion issued.
data.description: A positive development came from Bagsværd, Denmark as Novo Nordisk shared the news that the European Medicines Agency’s Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) has provided a favorable opinion. The recommendation is to update the Alhemo ® (concizumab) label to extend its usage to include the treatment of severe haemophilia A and moderate or severe haemophilia B without inhibitors. This is significant for the medical community and patients as it expands the scope of treatment options available for these specific conditions. Haemophilia A and B patients without inhibitors may now have access to this updated treatment option. This decision marks a positive step forward in enhancing patient care for those affected by these types of haemophilia.

data.title: Gorman-Rupp Company reports Q2 2025 revenue at $179.0M, up 5.6% from Q2 2024. Achieved net income of $15.8M.
data.description: MANSFIELD, Ohio--In the second quarter of 2025, The Gorman-Rupp Company (NYSE: GRC) announced its financial results, showcasing record net sales reaching $179.0 million, a 5.6% increase equating to $9.5 million, from the same period in 2024. The company also achieved a record net income of $15.8 million, or $0.60 per share, surpassing the $8.3 million net income, or $0.32 per share, from the second quarter of 2024. Additionally, adjusted earnings per share1 for the quarter amounted to [insert exact figure].

data.title: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) to release Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 7, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 am EST. Phone: 877-407-8835. Website: investors.kenvue.com.
data.description: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 before the market opens on August 7, 2025. Following this, the company will conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to delve into the financial performance. To participate in the conference call, individuals can dial 877-407-8835 from within the U.S. or +1 201-689-8779 from international locations. Moreover, a live webcast of the event will be accessible at investors.kenvue.com. For those unable to attend the live session, a replay will be made available at a later time.

data.description: In McLean, Virginia, Booz Allen Hamilton (NYSE: BAH) released initial details on their first quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings.

data.title: AST SpaceMobile prices private offering at $500 million for convertible senior notes due 2032 at $120.12 per share.
data.description: In Midland, Texas, AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) disclosed the details of their latest venture. The company, known for constructing the inaugural space-based cellular broadband network catered for regular smartphones, outlined the pricing specifics. They announced securing $500.0 million in total principal amount for convertible senior notes set to mature in 2032. This fundraising endeavor, termed the "Notes Offering," targeted qualified institutional investors. The initiative aims to enhance AST SpaceMobile's unique network, accessible for both commercial and governmental use.

data.title: GrafTech reports Q2 2025 results: 12% sales volume growth. Expecting 10% increase in sales volume for full year.
data.description: In Brooklyn Heights, Ohio, GrafTech International Ltd. (NYSE: EAF) shared its unaudited financial figures for the quarter and six months ending on June 30, 2025. The company reported a remarkable 12% increase in sales volume for the second quarter of 2025 compared to the previous year, marking GrafTech's best sales volume achievement since Q3 of 2022. They are anticipating a further 10% rise in sales volume for the entire year of 2025.
